uin_code.source_quote: ManipalCigna ProHealth Insurance | Terms & Conditions | UIN: MCIHLIP24011V072324 | April 2023

min_entry_age.source_quote: Child entry standard 91 days (per Policy Schedule)

max_entry_age.source_quote: Adult entry per Policy Schedule (ProHealth Protect: 18-65 years standard)

sum_insured_options.source_quote: SI options per Policy Schedule (Protect variant typically lower range: 2.5L / 3L / 4.5L / 5L)

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 30-day waiting period applies to illness (standard IRDAI clause)

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: applicable months (24 months for Preferred, Premier plan/ 36 months for Plus, Accumulate plan/ 48 months for Protect plan) of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Specified disease/procedure Waiting Period ... excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: E.I.18. Maternity Code-Excl 18 (applicable to Protect and Accumulate plan) — i.e., maternity is EXCLUDED in Protect variant

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Pre-hospitalization Medical Expenses Covered up to 60 days before date of hospitalization

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Post-hospitalization Medical Expenses Covered up to 90 days post discharge from hospital (Protect variant)

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: For the list of Day Care Treatments refer Annexure II of the Policy.

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Cover Covered up to full Sum Insured

maternity_coverage.source_quote: E.I.18. Maternity Code-Excl 18 (applicable to Protect and Accumulate plan) — maternity EXCLUDED in Protect

newborn_coverage.source_quote: Maternity excluded in Protect; newborn linked to maternity

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Donor Expenses (Hospitalization Expenses of the donor providing the organ) Covered up to full Sum Insured

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: Cumulative Bonus A guaranteed 25% increase in Sum Insured per policy year, maximum up to 200% of Sum Insured

restoration_benefit.value: Multiple Restoration available for unrelated illnesses
restoration_benefit.source_quote: Restoration of Sum Insured ... Multiple Restoration is available in a Policy Year for unrelated illnesses

room_rent_capping.value: Up to any Room Category except Suite or higher (for SI ≥ ₹7.5 Lacs); lower SI variants have room-category caps
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Inpatient Room For Sum Insured ₹7.5 Lacs and Above - Covered up to any Room Category

copayment_pct.source_quote: Mandatory co-payment of 20% for Insured Persons Aged 65 years and above (waiver of mandatory copay available; base copay 0% for under-65)

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: TAT governed by IRDAI Master Circular

_meta.notes: ProHealth Protect is the entry tier of ProHealth family. 48-month PED, no maternity, 90-day post-hospitalization.
